per_turn_leaks.student_message: That sounds really uncomfortable. I can tell this has been weighing on you.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Thank you for understanding. It's not just the pain - I've also had bloody stools with mucus, bright red blood mixed with stool, which is absolutely terrifying to me.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I've also been experiencing increased bowel frequency - I'm talking 8-10 bowel movements per day, which is way up from my usual 1-2. The stool itself is loose to watery and feels really urgent, like I have to go right away.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: It must be frightening when symptoms like these happen. Any other areas of your body affected?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've also been experiencing some achy pain in both knees and ankles, but there's no swelling or redness on my skin. It's more of a dull ache that comes and goes, and I'm not sure if it's related to my stomach issues or something else entirely.
